title: habenaria crassilabia
intro: Habenaria crassilabia, also known as the thick-lipped yellow orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilator properties. In herbal preparations, Habenaria crassilabia is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
